rajasthan.name: Rajasthan
rajasthan.tagline: Land of Kings, Colors & Timeless Heritage
rajasthan.description: Rajasthan is India's largest state and a treasure trove of royal palaces, ancient forts, and vibrant desert culture. From the Pink City of Jaipur to the Blue City of Jodhpur, the romantic lakes of Udaipur, and the golden sands of Jaisalmer, every corner tells a story of valor and grandeur.

seo.title: Rajasthan Tour Packages | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Explore Rajasthan with Tourishq — handpicked packages covering Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur & Jaisalmer. Budget to luxury options starting from ₹18,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Jaipur
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, check-in, evening at Hawa Mahal & Johari Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Exploration
itinerary.description: Amber Fort elephant ride, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, local cuisine dinner.

itinerary.title: Jaipur → Pushkar
itinerary.description: Drive 150 km to Pushkar. Visit Brahma Temple, Pushkar Lake, camel safari at sunset.

itinerary.title: Pushkar → Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Drive 190 km. Mehrangarh Fort tour, blue city walk, local dal baati dinner.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur Departure
itinerary.description: Morning Umaid Bhawan Palace visit, transfer to airport/station.

itinerary.title: Arrive Jaipur
itinerary.description: Welcome dinner, overnight at 4-star heritage hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur — Pink City
itinerary.description: Amber Fort, Jal Mahal, City Palace museum, Nahargarh Fort sunset view.

itinerary.title: Jaipur → Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Drive via Ajmer. Dargah Sharif visit. Jodhpur city walk at dusk.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur — Blue City
itinerary.description: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, old city lanes, step-well (Toorji Ka Jhalra).

itinerary.title: Jodhpur → Jaisalmer
itinerary.description: Drive through Thar Desert. Sam Sand Dunes arrival. Camel safari + cultural dinner at desert camp.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer — The Golden Fort
itinerary.description: Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli, Gadisar Lake boat ride. Overnight camp.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer → Udaipur
itinerary.description: Fly to Udaipur (flight extra). Lake Pichola sunset boat ride. City Palace visit.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Departure
itinerary.description: Morning at leisure, Saheliyon Ki Bari, transfer to airport.

packages.title: Maharaja's Rajasthan

itinerary.title: Arrive Delhi → Jaipur
itinerary.description: Private airport transfer. Check in at Rambagh Palace or Taj Jai Mahal. Welcome cocktail.

itinerary.title: Jaipur — Royally
itinerary.description: Private Amber Fort tour with elephant ride. Exclusive City Palace curator's tour. Hot air balloon at sunrise.

itinerary.title: Jaipur at leisure
itinerary.description: Cooking class at a heritage haveli. Gem market private tour with jeweler. Nahargarh sundowner.

itinerary.title: Jaipur → Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Chauffeured drive. Check-in Umaid Bhawan Palace (Taj wing). Sundowner at the Palace.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur — Private
itinerary.description: Private fort access before opening hours. Blue city walk with local historian. Rooftop private dinner.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur → Jaisalmer
itinerary.description: Private jeep drive through Thar. Arrive luxury desert camp (Suryagarh or equivalent). Dune sundowner.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer Golden City
itinerary.description: Private fort walk with art historian. Exquisite haveli viewing. Sunset camel ride.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer → Udaipur
itinerary.description: Private flight (included). Check-in Taj Lake Palace or Raas Devigarh. Evening boat on Lake Pichola.

itinerary.title: Udaipur — City of Lakes
itinerary.description: City Palace private guided tour. Vintage car ride. Farewell gala dinner overlooking Lake Pichola.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast at leisure. Chauffeured airport transfer with departure gift hamper.

inclusions: All internal transfers incl. Jaisalmer–Udaipur flight

kerala.name: Kerala
kerala.tagline: God's Own Country — Backwaters, Beaches & Spice
kerala.description: Kerala is a tropical paradise on India's southwestern coast. Drift through the legendary backwaters on a houseboat, trek through misty tea gardens in Munnar, unwind on serene Kovalam beaches, and experience authentic Ayurvedic wellness retreats.

seo.title: Kerala Tour Packages | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Explore God's Own Country with Tourishq — backwater houseboats, Munnar tea gardens & Kovalam beaches. Packages starting from ₹22,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi
itinerary.description: Fort Kochi walking tour, Chinese fishing nets, Jewish Synagogue, overnight Kochi.

itinerary.title: Kochi → Munnar
itinerary.description: Drive 120 km through spice gardens. Tea museum visit. Evening in Munnar town.

itinerary.title: Munnar — Tea Country
itinerary.description: Eravikulam National Park, Top Station viewpoint, local tea tasting.

itinerary.title: Munnar → Alleppey
itinerary.description: Drive to Alleppey. Board AC houseboat for overnight backwater cruise. Traditional Kerala meals.

itinerary.title: Alleppey → Kovalam
itinerary.description: Morning disembark. Drive to Kovalam. Beach relaxation, sunset at Lighthouse Beach.

itinerary.title: Kovalam → Trivandrum Departure
itinerary.description: Morning Ayurvedic massage (30 min), transfer to Trivandrum airport.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi
itinerary.description: Luxury airport transfer. Sunset harbour cruise. Heritage boutique hotel in Fort Kochi.

itinerary.title: Kochi → Wayanad
itinerary.description: Scenic drive through ghats. Check-in luxury tree-house resort. Evening nature walk.

itinerary.title: Wayanad Wildlife
itinerary.description: Private jeep safari at Wayanad Wildlife Sanctuary. Bamboo rafting. Tribal village visit.

itinerary.title: Wayanad → Munnar
itinerary.description: Drive through Ooty ghats. Check-in 5-star resort with valley views. Sunset tea garden walk.

itinerary.title: Munnar Luxury Day
itinerary.description: Private tea estate tour with plucking experience. Spa day at resort. Chef's dinner.

itinerary.title: Munnar → Alleppey
itinerary.description: Arrive at premium luxury houseboat with private chef. Sunset canapes on deck.

itinerary.title: Alleppey Backwaters
itinerary.description: Full day backwater cruise with village stops. Cooking demonstration. Candlelit dinner on water.

itinerary.title: Alleppey → Kovalam
itinerary.description: Check-in Leela Kovalam or similar beach resort. Ayurvedic Panchakarma session (2 hrs).

itinerary.title: Kovalam → Trivandrum Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast at leisure. Transfer with farewell gift hamper.

himachal.name: Himachal Pradesh
himachal.tagline: Snow-Capped Peaks, Apple Orchards & Alpine Calm
himachal.description: Himachal Pradesh is the Himalayan playground of northern India. From the colonial charm of Shimla to the bohemian valleys of Manali and Kasol, from paragliding in Bir Billing to the ancient temples of Spiti — Himachal is an adventure and a meditation rolled into one.

seo.title: Himachal Pradesh Tour Packages | Tourishq
seo.description: Discover Himachal Pradesh with Tourishq — Shimla, Manali & Kasol packages with adventure activities. Starting from ₹19,999.

itinerary.title: Delhi → Shimla
itinerary.description: Overnight bus or drive. Check-in hotel.

itinerary.title: Shimla Exploration
itinerary.description: Mall Road, Christ Church, Jakhu Temple, Scandal Point. Evening stroll.

itinerary.title: Shimla → Manali
itinerary.description: Scenic 7-hour drive via Kullu Valley. River Beas views. Check-in Manali.

itinerary.title: Manali Local
itinerary.description: Hadimba Temple, Van Vihar, Old Manali market. River-side bonfire evening.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley / Rohtang
itinerary.description: Snow activities: skiing, snowmobiling, zorbing. Rohtang Pass (subject to permit).

itinerary.title: Manali Leisure
itinerary.description: Vashisht hot springs, river rafting on Beas (optional), shopping in Old Manali.

itinerary.title: Manali → Delhi
itinerary.description: Overnight Volvo bus return to Delhi.

itinerary.title: Arrive Chandigarh → Shimla
itinerary.description: Toy train from Kalka to Shimla (heritage ride). Check-in.

itinerary.title: Shimla
itinerary.description: Viceregal Lodge, Kufri day trip (snow & yaks), Himalayan Nature Park.

itinerary.title: Shimla → Kasol
itinerary.description: Drive via Rampur. Arrive Kasol — the 'Mini Israel' of India. Evening by Parvati River.

itinerary.title: Kheerganga Trek
itinerary.description: Full-day trek to Kheerganga hot springs (12 km). Overnight at Kasol.

itinerary.title: Kasol → Manali
itinerary.description: Scenic drive through Kullu. Check-in heritage Manali hotel.

itinerary.title: Manali Adventure
itinerary.description: White-water rafting on Beas, Solang Valley snow activities, zip-lining.

itinerary.title: Manali → Bir
itinerary.description: Drive 75 km to Bir Billing (world-class paragliding site). Check-in.

itinerary.title: Bir Billing Paragliding
itinerary.description: Tandem paragliding from Billing (2,400 m). Tibetan colony visit.

itinerary.title: Bir → Dharamsala
itinerary.description: Drive 60 km. McLeodGanj, Namgyal Monastery, Dalai Lama Temple.

itinerary.title: Dharamsala → Delhi Departure
itinerary.description: Morning yoga class, afternoon transfer to Delhi.

ladakh.name: Ladakh
ladakh.tagline: Land of High Passes — The Last Frontier
ladakh.description: Ladakh is the roof of the world — a high-altitude desert landscape of monasteries perched on clifftops, turquoise lakes that mirror the sky, and mountain passes that take your breath away literally and figuratively. An experience unlike any other on Earth.

seo.title: Ladakh Tour Packages | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Explore the roof of the world with Tourishq Ladakh packages — Pangong Lake, Nubra Valley & Khardung La. Starting from ₹27,999.

packages.title: Leh–Ladakh Explorer
highlights: Khardung La world's highest motorable pass

itinerary.title: Arrive Leh (3,500 m)
itinerary.description: Rest day for acclimatization. Light walk around Leh market. No strenuous activity.

itinerary.title: Leh Local
itinerary.description: Leh Palace, Shanti Stupa, Hemis Monastery, Thiksey Monastery. Oxygen bar visit if needed.

itinerary.title: Leh → Nubra Valley
itinerary.description: Drive over Khardung La (5,359 m). Diskit Monastery. Evening Bactrian camel safari on Hunder sand dunes.

itinerary.title: Nubra → Pangong Lake
itinerary.description: Drive via Shyok Valley. Arrive at the iconic Pangong Tso. Watch sunset on the lake. Overnight camp.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake Morning
itinerary.description: Sunrise at the lake (blue, green, purple shifting colors). Drive back to Leh via Chang La (5,360 m).

itinerary.title: Leh Leisure
itinerary.description: Local market shopping for pashmina & turquoise. Optional jeep safari or Markha valley trek preview.

itinerary.title: Leh Departure
itinerary.description: Early morning transfer to Leh airport.

kashmir.name: Kashmir
kashmir.tagline: Heaven on Earth — Dal Lake, Snowfields & Saffron Valleys
kashmir.description: Kashmir earns its title 'Heaven on Earth' with the iconic Dal Lake houseboats, the flower-carpeted Gulmarg meadows, the apple orchards of Pahalgam, and the pristine Sonamarg glacier valley. A destination of breathtaking natural beauty and warm Kashmiri hospitality.

seo.title: Kashmir Tour Packages | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Experience Heaven on Earth with Tourishq Kashmir packages — Dal Lake houseboats, Gulmarg snow & Pahalgam valleys. Starting from ₹24,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Srinagar
itinerary.description: Shikara ride on Dal Lake, Mughal Gardens (Shalimar, Nishat). Check-in deluxe houseboat.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg Day Trip
itinerary.description: Drive 60 km to Gulmarg meadow. Gondola Phase 1 & 2 to Apharwat Peak. Snow activities.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam
itinerary.description: Drive through Awantipora ruins. Pahalgam valley, Betaab Valley, Chandanwari. Lidder River bank picnic.

itinerary.title: Sonamarg Day Trip
itinerary.description: Drive 80 km to Sonamarg. Thajiwas Glacier pony ride. Alpine meadow picnic.

itinerary.title: Srinagar City
itinerary.description: Old city Jama Masjid, Shah-e-Hamdan shrine, handicraft market (papier-mâché, carpets, pashmina).

itinerary.title: Srinagar Departure
itinerary.description: Morning Shikara sunrise ride. Transfer to airport.

uttarakhand.name: Uttarakhand
uttarakhand.tagline: Dev Bhoomi — Yoga, Rivers & Himalayan Trails
uttarakhand.description: Uttarakhand is India's spiritual heartland — the land of the gods. From the yoga capital of Rishikesh with its white-water rapids to the pilgrim trails of Char Dham, from the misty hill stations of Mussoorie and Nainital to the wildlife riches of Jim Corbett National Park.

seo.title: Uttarakhand Tour Packages | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Explore Dev Bhoomi with Tourishq — Rishikesh, Nainital, Mussoorie & Jim Corbett packages. Starting from ₹16,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Haridwar
itinerary.description: Har Ki Pauri Ganga Aarti at sunset. Check-in hotel.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh
itinerary.description: Laxman Jhula, Ram Jhula, Beatles Ashram. Afternoon white-water rafting on Ganga.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh → Nainital
itinerary.description: Drive 290 km through Kumaon hills. Arrive Nainital. Mall Road walk.

itinerary.title: Nainital
itinerary.description: Naini Lake boat ride, Snow View Point ropeway, Naina Devi Temple, Zoo.

itinerary.title: Nainital → Delhi
itinerary.description: Morning Eco Cave Gardens, drive back to Delhi.

northeast.name: North-East India
northeast.tagline: India's Hidden Paradise — Waterfalls, Tribes & Living Root Bridges
northeast.description: The seven sister states of Northeast India are India's best-kept secret. Meghalaya's living root bridges and cloud-kissed villages, Assam's one-horned rhinos and tea gardens, Arunachal's Buddhist monasteries, and Sikkim's flower valleys — this region is extraordinary in every way.

seo.title: North-East India Tour Packages | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Explore India's hidden paradise with Tourishq — Meghalaya, Assam, Sikkim & Arunachal packages. Starting from ₹28,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Guwahati
itinerary.description: Kamakhya Temple, Brahmaputra river cruise at sunset.

itinerary.title: Kaziranga
itinerary.description: Morning jeep safari (one-horned rhino, elephant, wild buffalo). Afternoon elephant back safari.

itinerary.title: Kaziranga → Shillong
itinerary.description: Drive to Scotland of the East. Ward's Lake, Police Bazaar, Don Bosco Museum.

itinerary.title: Cherrapunji
itinerary.description: Nohkalikai Waterfall (India's highest), Mawsmai Caves, Eco Park. Day trip from Shillong.

itinerary.title: Nongriat Trek
itinerary.description: Full day trek to double-decker living root bridge (6 km, 3,500 steps). Most unique sight in India.

itinerary.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong
itinerary.description: Dawki crystal-clear Umngot River boat ride. Mawlynnong (Asia's cleanest village). Living root bridge.

itinerary.title: Shillong → Guwahati → Departure
itinerary.description: Drive to Guwahati airport. Departure.

spiti.name: Spiti Valley
spiti.tagline: The Middle Land — Buddhist Monasteries Above the Clouds
spiti.description: Spiti is a cold desert mountain valley in the Himalayas, cut off from the world for months each year. Ancient Buddhist monasteries cling to cliffsides at 4,000+ meters. The landscape is stark, lunar, and profoundly beautiful. This is for the traveler who seeks the road less traveled.

seo.title: Spiti Valley Tour Packages | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Explore the remote Spiti Valley with Tourishq — Key Monastery, Chandratal Lake & high-altitude desert. Starting from ₹24,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Manali
itinerary.description: Acclimatization. Local walk, Old Manali. Overnight hotel.

itinerary.title: Manali → Kaza via Kunzum Pass
itinerary.description: Drive over Rohtang & Kunzum Pass (4,550 m). Chandratal Lake detour. Arrive Kaza.

itinerary.title: Kaza Exploration
itinerary.description: Key Monastery (oldest and highest monastery). Kibber village. Ki village fossil park.

itinerary.title: Langza & Komic
itinerary.description: Langza Buddha statue (4,400 m). Komic — world's highest motorable village. Hikkim post office.

itinerary.title: Pin Valley
itinerary.description: Pin Valley National Park — snow leopard habitat. Mud village, Sagnam. River crossing.

itinerary.title: Dhankar & Tabo
itinerary.description: Dhankar Monastery on cliff. Dhankar Lake trek (2 hrs). Tabo Monastery (1,000 years old).

itinerary.title: Tabo → Nako → Shimla
itinerary.description: Drive via Nako Lake (Tibet border views), Kalpa (Kinner Kailash views). Overnight Shimla.

itinerary.title: Shimla Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Chandigarh airport or Delhi (overnight bus).

bali.name: Bali
bali.tagline: Island of Gods — Rice Terraces, Temples & Tropical Bliss
bali.description: Bali is the crown jewel of Indonesia — a magical island where ancient Hindu culture meets stunning natural beauty. Sunrise over volcanic Mount Batur, emerald rice terraces in Ubud, dramatic sea temples at Tanah Lot, and the legendary surf of Seminyak all await.

seo.title: Bali Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Bali holiday packages for Indian travelers — Ubud, Seminyak & Nusa Penida. Visa on arrival. Starting from ₹39,999 including flights.

itinerary.title: Arrive Denpasar
itinerary.description: Airport transfer to Ubud hotel. Evening Kecak fire dance show.

itinerary.title: Ubud
itinerary.description: Tegallalang rice terraces, Sacred Monkey Forest, Ubud Palace & Market, local cooking class.

itinerary.title: Mount Batur
itinerary.description: Pre-dawn hike to Batur volcano summit (1,717 m). Watch sunrise above the clouds. Back for breakfast.

itinerary.title: Tanah Lot & Seminyak
itinerary.description: Tanah Lot sea temple at sunset. Check-in Seminyak. Beach club evening.

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Day Trip
itinerary.description: Speedboat to Nusa Penida. Kelingking Beach (T-Rex cliff), Angel's Billabong, Broken Beach.

itinerary.title: Seminyak → Departure
itinerary.description: Morning beach walk, shopping on Seminyak Strip. Transfer to airport.

packages.title: Bali Luxury Retreat
highlights: Private cooking class with celebrity chef

itinerary.title: Arrive Bali
itinerary.description: Private airport transfer. Check-in luxury private pool villa in Ubud jungle. Welcome cocktail & spa.

itinerary.title: Ubud Culture
itinerary.description: Private guided Ubud walk. Exclusive temple blessing ceremony. Sunset at Campuhan Ridge.

itinerary.title: Batur Sunrise + Spa
itinerary.description: Private guided Batur sunrise trek. Return to villa. Full-day spa with Balinese Boreh treatment.

itinerary.title: Cooking & Crafts
itinerary.description: Private cooking masterclass with top Balinese chef. Silver smithing or woodcarving class. Sunset dinner.

itinerary.title: Nusa Lembongan
itinerary.description: Private speedboat to Nusa Lembongan. Scuba diving or snorkeling with manta rays. Cliff-top lunch.

itinerary.title: Seminyak
itinerary.description: Move to beach villa. COMO Shambhala or Potato Head Beach Club sunset. Romantic dinner on beach.

itinerary.title: Seminyak Leisure
itinerary.description: Spa morning. Private shopping tour with local stylist. Farewell dinner at world-class restaurant.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Private departure transfer with farewell gift.

inclusions: 7 nights (private pool villa + luxury beach villa)

thailand.name: Thailand
thailand.tagline: The Land of Smiles — Temples, Islands & Street Food Bliss
thailand.description: Thailand enchants every traveler — from the glittering temples of Bangkok to the turquoise waters of Phuket and Koh Samui, from the jungle mountains of Chiang Mai to the party islands of Koh Phangan. World-class hospitality, incredible food, and exceptional value.

seo.title: Thailand Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Thailand holiday packages — Bangkok, Phuket & Chiang Mai. Visa on arrival for Indians. Starting from ₹34,999 with flights.

itinerary.title: Arrive Bangkok
itinerary.description: Airport transfer. Evening Khao San Road & Night Market.

itinerary.title: Bangkok Temples
itinerary.description: Grand Palace & Wat Phra Kaew, Wat Pho (Reclining Buddha), Wat Arun by river taxi. Rooftop bar evening.

itinerary.title: Bangkok Floating Market
itinerary.description: Damnoen Saduak Floating Market. Afternoon fly to Phuket (domestic, extra).

itinerary.title: Phi Phi Island Speedboat
itinerary.description: Full-day speedboat to Maya Bay, Phi Phi Don & Ley, snorkeling, Viking Cave.

itinerary.title: James Bond Island
itinerary.description: Phang Nga Bay kayaking. James Bond Island. Sea caves. Thai seafood lunch on island.

itinerary.title: Phuket Beach Day
itinerary.description: Patong Beach, Bangla Road evening, Tiger Kingdom optional.

itinerary.title: Phuket Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Phuket airport. Departure.

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.tagline: City of Gold — Desert Safaris, Skyscrapers & Ultra-Luxury
dubai.description: Dubai is a city of superlatives — the world's tallest building, biggest mall, most luxurious hotels. But it's also a city of contrasts: ancient souks next to ultramodern skyscrapers, camel races alongside Formula 1 tracks, and desert dunes an hour from a ski slope.

seo.title: Dubai Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Dubai holiday packages — Burj Khalifa, Desert Safari & luxury resorts. Visa on arrival for Indian passport. Starting from ₹44,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Dubai
itinerary.description: Hotel check-in. Evening Dubai Marina Walk & JBR Beach. Dinner at a waterfront restaurant.

itinerary.title: Dubai City Tour
itinerary.description: Burj Khalifa At The Top (124th floor), Dubai Mall fountain show, Dubai Frame, Dubai Museum.

itinerary.title: Desert Safari
itinerary.description: Afternoon: dune bashing in 4WD, camel ride, sandboarding, sunset photoshoot, BBQ dinner with belly dance.

itinerary.title: Old Dubai & Shopping
itinerary.description: Gold Souk, Spice Souk, Abra crossing Dubai Creek, Al Fahidi historical district. Free afternoon for shopping.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Optional Atlantis/Palm Jumeirah visit. Airport transfer.

maldives.name: Maldives
maldives.tagline: Ocean Villas & Coral Gardens — The Ultimate Island Escape
maldives.description: The Maldives is paradise distilled to its purest form — 1,200 coral islands scattered across the Indian Ocean, each with white powder beaches, crystal lagoons, and the world's most diverse marine life. Overwater villas, bioluminescent bays, and absolute peace await.

seo.title: Maldives Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Maldives honeymoon & holiday packages — overwater villas, snorkeling & private islands. Starting from ₹79,999 per couple.

itinerary.title: Arrive Malé → Resort Transfer
itinerary.description: Speedboat or seaplane to resort. Welcome cocktail. Beach villa check-in. Sunset from your deck.

itinerary.title: Ocean Day
itinerary.description: Morning snorkeling with reef sharks, turtles, manta rays. Afternoon beach leisure. Sunset dolphin cruise.

itinerary.title: Island Hopping
itinerary.description: Local island visit (Maafushi), sandbank picnic, underwater sea walk, bioluminescent beach at night.

itinerary.title: Water Sports & Spa
itinerary.description: Jet ski, parasailing, kayaking. Afternoon couples massage at overwater spa. Underwater restaurant dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Checkout. Transfer to Malé. Departure flight.

europe.name: Europe
europe.tagline: Art, History & Cafés — The Grand Continental Experience
europe.description: Europe is the world's greatest open-air museum — centuries of art, architecture, and culture packed into one continent. Walk the streets of Rome where gladiators once fought, cruise the canals of Venice, photograph the Eiffel Tower at night, and savor wine in Santorini as the sun sets over the Aegean.

seo.title: Europe Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Europe holiday packages — Paris, Rome, Switzerland & Santorini. Schengen visa assistance included. Starting from ₹89,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Paris
itinerary.description: Hotel check-in. Evening Seine cruise + Eiffel Tower illuminated.

itinerary.title: Paris
itinerary.description: Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame (exterior), Montmartre, Sacré-Cœur. Dinner at Le Marais.

itinerary.title: Paris → Brussels
itinerary.description: Eurostar to Brussels. Grand Place, Manneken Pis, Belgian waffle & chocolate.

itinerary.title: Brussels → Amsterdam
itinerary.description: Train to Amsterdam. Canal cruise, Anne Frank House, Rijksmuseum.

itinerary.title: Amsterdam
itinerary.description: Vondelpark, Jordaan district, Heineken Experience, Van Gogh Museum.

itinerary.title: Amsterdam → London
itinerary.description: Eurostar via Brussels. Big Ben, Westminster, Tower Bridge, Thames cruise.

itinerary.title: London
itinerary.description: British Museum, Buckingham Palace, St. Paul's Cathedral, Borough Market.

itinerary.title: London Day 3
itinerary.description: Day trip to Windsor Castle or Stonehenge. Evening West End show.

itinerary.title: London Shopping & Departure Prep
itinerary.description: Oxford Street, Harrods, Covent Garden. Final dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure from London
itinerary.description: Transfer to Heathrow. Departure.

vietnam.name: Vietnam
vietnam.tagline: Heritage, Halong Bay & Incredible Street Food
vietnam.description: Vietnam is a country of extraordinary beauty and historical depth — from the ancient streets of Hoi An lantern-lit at night to the emerald waters of Halong Bay, the French colonial elegance of Hanoi's Old Quarter to the electric energy of Ho Chi Minh City. Arguably Southeast Asia's finest destination.

seo.title: Vietnam Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Vietnam holiday packages — Halong Bay, Hoi An & Hanoi. E-visa on arrival for Indians. Starting from ₹42,999.

itinerary.title: Arrive Hanoi
itinerary.description: Old Quarter walk, Hoan Kiem Lake, Temple of Literature. Bia Hoi street food evening.

itinerary.title: Hanoi → Halong Bay
itinerary.description: 3-hour drive. Board luxury junk boat. Kayaking through caves. Sunset on deck.

itinerary.title: Halong Bay
itinerary.description: Sunrise yoga on deck. Pearl farm visit. Fishing village visit by kayak. Disembark, fly to Da Nang.

itinerary.title: Da Nang & Hoi An
itinerary.description: Marble Mountains, My Son Sanctuary (Cham towers). Evening lantern-lit Hoi An Ancient Town.

itinerary.title: Hoi An
itinerary.description: Tailor street (custom clothes), local cooking class, Tra Que herb village, cycling through rice fields.

itinerary.title: Hue Imperial City
itinerary.description: Day trip: Hue Citadel, Thien Mu Pagoda, royal tombs, dragon boat on Perfume River.

itinerary.title: Fly to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Arrive Saigon. Ben Thanh Market, Reunification Palace, War Remnants Museum.

itinerary.title: Cu Chi & Mekong
itinerary.description: Morning Cu Chi Tunnels (wartime underground network). Afternoon Mekong Delta sampan boat.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Departure
itinerary.description: Rooftop breakfast, final shopping, airport transfer.

singapore.name: Singapore
singapore.tagline: The Lion City — Gardens, Gastronomy & Urban Wonder
singapore.description: Singapore is Asia's most dynamic city-state — a futuristic garden city where gleaming skyscrapers rise alongside lush vertical gardens, where multicultural hawker centers serve some of the world's finest food, and where Marina Bay Sands offers the most iconic skyline view on Earth.

seo.title: Singapore Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Singapore holiday packages — Gardens by the Bay, Sentosa & Marina Bay Sands. Visa-free for Indians. Starting from ₹49,999.

packages.title: Singapore City Explorer

itinerary.title: Arrive Singapore
itinerary.description: Airport transfer. Orchard Road shopping. Evening Clarke Quay dinner on the river.

itinerary.title: Sentosa Island
itinerary.description: Universal Studios Singapore (full day). Evening S.E.A. Aquarium or Wings of Time show.

itinerary.title: City & Bay
itinerary.description: Marina Bay Sands Skypark, Gardens by the Bay (Flower Dome + Cloud Forest), Marina Bay waterfront.

itinerary.title: Culture & Night Safari
itinerary.description: Chinatown, Little India, Arab Quarter. Evening: Singapore Night Safari (world's first).

itinerary.title: Shopping & Departure
itinerary.description: Mustafa Centre, airport duty-free. Departure.

exclusions: No visa required for Indian passport holders

japan.name: Japan
japan.tagline: Ancient & Futuristic — Cherry Blossoms, Temples & Bullet Trains
japan.description: Japan is like no other place on Earth — a seamless blend of ancient tradition and cutting-edge modernity. Cherry blossom season in Kyoto's temple gardens, bullet trains between cities, robotic restaurants in Tokyo, and the serene meditations of Mount Koya — Japan rewards every traveler.

seo.title: Japan Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Japan holiday packages — Tokyo, Kyoto, Osaka & Mount Fuji. Visa required. Starting from ₹99,999 with bullet train pass.

itinerary.title: Arrive Tokyo
itinerary.description: Narita Express. Hotel check-in Shinjuku. Evening Omoide Yokocho alley & ramen.

itinerary.title: Tokyo — Modern
itinerary.description: Shibuya crossing, Harajuku Takeshita Street, Omotesando Hills, Meiji Shrine, Akihabara.

itinerary.title: Tokyo — Traditional
itinerary.description: Senso-ji Temple Asakusa, teamLab Planets (digital art), Tokyo Skytree, Sumida River cruise.

itinerary.title: Mount Fuji Day Trip
itinerary.description: Day trip to Fuji 5th Station (if season) or Hakone with Fuji views, hot springs, cable car.

itinerary.title: Tokyo → Kyoto
itinerary.description: Shinkansen bullet train (2.5 hrs). Arrive Kyoto. Gion district evening walk — geisha spotting.

itinerary.title: Kyoto Temples
itinerary.description: Fushimi Inari (10,000 torii gates at dawn), Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion), Arashiyama bamboo forest.

itinerary.title: Kyoto → Nara → Osaka
itinerary.description: Nara Deer Park, Todai-ji Giant Buddha. Continue to Osaka. Dotonbori neon lights evening.

itinerary.title: Osaka
itinerary.description: Osaka Castle, Kuromon Market (food), Shinsekai, Universal Studios (optional upgrade).

itinerary.title: Hiroshima & Miyajima
itinerary.description: Bullet train to Hiroshima. Peace Memorial Museum. Miyajima Island floating torii gate.

itinerary.title: Osaka → Departure
itinerary.description: Return to Osaka. Departure from Kansai airport.

australia.name: Australia
australia.tagline: The Great Outdoors — Coral Reefs, Outback & City Glamour
australia.description: Australia is a continent of extraordinary diversity — the technicolor Great Barrier Reef, the ancient ochre Uluru rising from the Outback, the opera house on Sydney Harbour, and the wild coastlines of the Great Ocean Road. Koalas, kangaroos, and world-class wine await.

seo.title: Australia Tour Packages from India | Tourishq Travel Solutions
seo.description: Australia holiday packages — Sydney, Great Barrier Reef & Uluru. Starting from ₹1,19,999 with flights.

itinerary.title: Arrive Sydney
itinerary.description: Airport transfer. Circular Quay. Sydney Opera House exterior. Bridge Climb (optional).

itinerary.title: Sydney City
itinerary.description: Bondi Beach, Taronga Zoo, Darling Harbour, The Rocks historic district.

itinerary.title: Blue Mountains Day Trip
itinerary.description: Three Sisters, Scenic World cable car, Jenolan Caves. Return to Sydney.

itinerary.title: Sydney → Cairns
itinerary.description: Fly to Cairns. Afternoon at leisure. Muddy's Playground beach.

itinerary.title: Great Barrier Reef
itinerary.description: Full-day cruise to outer reef. Snorkeling & scuba diving (certified). Glass-bottom boat optional.

itinerary.title: Daintree Rainforest
itinerary.description: World's oldest tropical rainforest (135 million years). Mossman Gorge swim. Cape Tribulation.

itinerary.title: Cairns → Melbourne
itinerary.description: Fly to Melbourne. Yarra River walk, Federation Square, Queen Victoria Market evening.

itinerary.title: Melbourne City
itinerary.description: Royal Botanic Gardens, NGV art gallery, Laneways street art, St. Kilda Beach.

itinerary.title: Great Ocean Road Day 1
itinerary.description: Drive the world-famous coastal road. Torquay Surf Beach, Lorne, Apollo Bay.

itinerary.title: Great Ocean Road Day 2
itinerary.description: Twelve Apostles limestone stacks. Loch Ard Gorge. Return to Melbourne.

itinerary.title: Melbourne to Sydney
itinerary.description: Morning Healesville Sanctuary (koalas, kangaroos). Fly to Sydney for departure connection.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Sydney international airport. Departure.
